mnemonics: G.R.O.U.P.S. - Gather Requirements, Organize Units, Plan Structures, Synchronize
keyPoints: Collaborative design and implementation of a network topology.
Division of tasks like subnetting, routing, and security configuration among team members.
Practical application of theoretical concepts like TCP/IP, DNS, and DHCP.
commonMistakes: Uneven distribution of work leading to incomplete or poorly integrated sections.
Failing to properly document the design and configuration steps for each group member.
Not testing the entire integrated network for connectivity and security issues after implementation.
